name: To acquire the strength that is needed to bear this heavy burden of responsibility the
introduction:
believers should do two things: they should develop patience and they should strengthen
themselves by devoting themselves to Prayer.
Later we shall encounter elaborations which will show that 'patience' is a word embracing a
whole set of moral virtues of the utmost importance. 'Patience' is indeed an indispensable
key to success. Likewise, we shall later have occasion to note in some detail how Prayer
prepares the Muslims, both as individuals and as a collective body, to carry out their
mission.
